calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Stephen Porter, Esq. for Plaintiff: Grubb & Nadler, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Sheron Chiu was sworn and direct examined.
Declaration of Sheron Chiu in support of the court judgment by default, received and filed in court.
After hearing the testimony and considering the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: SRI dba SRI Mortgage Group as follows:
Damages $299,571.56
Attorney Fee $3,723.20
Costs $335.00 for a total of $303,629.76
Judgment signed in open court.
